texto: I think 'Heroes of Cosplay' will show a lot of the positive things, like how much effort it takes to make a costume. These people on the show aren't taking shortcuts. As long as that effort gets through to the viewers, we will be inspirational. Then there will be people who watch the show that want to get in and hands-on make outfits.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Yaya Han: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “I think 'Heroes of Cosplay' will show a lot of the positive things, like how much effort it takes…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, positive, effort pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e effort.

As long as that effort gets through to the viewers, we will be inspirational. Then there will be people who watch the show that want to get in and hands-on make outfits.

texto: It can literally change someone's life it's very positive for young teenagers to get into cosplay if they do it with their friends or with supervision from their parents - it can really foster their social skills.
explicacao: Citação de Yaya Han sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It can literally change someone's life it's very positive for young teenagers to get into cosplay…” articula amizade, vida, change em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
